titleStmt.title: SII 24.215: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 215. (A.R. No. 46 of 1936-37.) SAME WALL.

summary.p: States that some lands which had been granted in exchange for a pathway to Kāvērī from Maṉṟachchanallūr, Uppūr, Nochchiyam, Attāṇi, Nelkuppai and others and included in the new colony of Kaliyugarāma-chaturvēdimaṅgalam were made tax-free from the 10th year of the king's reign.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
tribhuvanaccakravattikaḷ koṉeriṉmaikoṇṭāṉ maṉṟaccanallūr Uppūr nocciyam Attāṇi nelkkuppai Uḷḷiṭṭa Ūrkaḷil Ūrārkku . kāverik karaiyileṟat tāṅkaḷ teṟku nokkip pokiṟa nāṭṭup peruvaḻiyile cila Iṭam kāliṅkarāyaṉ vaitta kaliyukarāmaccaturvedimaṅkalattil vāstavilai kūṭṭiṉa paṭiyāle Itukku vikramacoḻaccaturvedimaṅkalattu sabhaiyār kāṇiyil vilai koṇṭu taṅkaḷukku vaḻiyāka viṭṭa nir nilakkuḻi Irupattāṟe kālukkum puṉceykuḻi patiṉaiñcaraikkum varum kaṭamai poṉvari
Upāti Uḷḷiṭṭa mutal pattāvatu pacāṉa mutal variyil kaḻikkac coṉṉom . Ippaṭikku Ivvolai piṭipāṭākak koṇṭu candrādityavaraiyum cellum paṭiyāka kallilum cempilum veṭṭuvittukkoṇṭu vaḻiyākkik koḷka § Ivai kulacekarak kāliṅkarāyaṉ Eḻuttu § Ivaiy pallavaraiyaṉeḻuttu § tulyam §
Digital edition of SII 24.215 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
